# Read the uploaded JSON files to inspect structure and search for Arabic text.
import json, re, unicodedata, sys, os

qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)

len(qdata), len(hdata)

# Let's inspect sample of qdata items structure and first occurrence
qdata[:3]

# Search for exact match
target = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
matches = [q for q in qdata if q.get('ayah_text') == target]
len(matches), matches[:5]

# Implement normalization and search for similar ayah texts
import re
def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s.strip()
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640', '')
    # unify hamza chars to bare hamza 'ء'
    s = s.replace('أ','ء').replace('إ','ء').replace('آ','ء').replace('ؤ','ء').replace('ئ','ء')
    # normalize alef maksura to ya
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # remove diacritics (tashkeel)
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # remove punctuation (keep Arabic letters and numbers and space)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', '', s)
    # collapse whitespace and lowercase (Arabic has no case)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

target_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
target_snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"

norm_full = normalize_arabic(target_full)
norm_snip = normalize_arabic(target_snippet)
norm_full, norm_snip

# Build normalized list and compute substring ratio and token F1
results = []
for q in qdata:
    text = q.get('ayah_text','')
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    lcs_sub = longest_common_substring(norm_full, norm)
    substr_ratio = lcs_sub / max(len(norm_full),1)
    f1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm)
    results.append((q, norm, substr_ratio, f1, text))

# Sort by max(substr_ratio,f1)
results_sorted = sorted(results, key=lambda x: max(x[2], x[3]), reverse=True)
results_sorted[:20]

# Search for any ayah containing phrase 'فِعْلَ الشُّكْرِ' exact (original with diacritics)
phrase = "فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
matches = [q for q in qdata if phrase in q.get('ayah_text','')]
len(matches), matches[:10]

norm_phrase = normalize_arabic("فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ")
candidates_phrase = [q for q in qdata if norm_phrase in normalize_arabic(q.get('ayah_text',''))]
len(candidates_phrase), candidates_phrase[:10]

# compute best matches in hadith DB for norm_full and norm_snip
def find_best_matches_in_hadith(norm_query, topn=10):
    best = []
    for h in hdata:
        # get text fields
        texts = []
        if h.get('Matn'):
            texts.append(h.get('Matn'))
        if h.get('hadithTxt'):
            texts.append(h.get('hadithTxt'))
        for txt in texts:
            norm_txt = normalize_arabic(txt)
            lcs_sub = longest_common_substring(norm_query, norm_txt)
            substr_ratio = lcs_sub / max(len(norm_query),1)
            f1 = token_f1(norm_query, norm_txt)
            best.append((substr_ratio, f1, h, txt, norm_txt))
    best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: max(x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
    return best_sorted[:topn]

best_full = find_best_matches_in_hadith(norm_full, topn=20)
best_snip = find_best_matches_in_hadith(norm_snip, topn=20)

best_full[:10], best_snip[:10]
